name: calabash molding tool
functional_purpose: mold the dough into a calabash-like shape

construction_steps.reason: the cylindrical body will be used to shape the dough

construction_steps.Instruction: Add a conical extension at the top of the cylindrical body
construction_steps.reason: the conical extension will help to shape the dough into a calabash-like shape

construction_steps.Instruction: Add a hemispherical extension at the bottom of the cylindrical body
construction_steps.reason: the hemispherical extension will help to support the dough and prevent it from falling
